title: helichrysum fruticans
intro: Helichrysum fruticans, also known as the annual helichrysum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of helichrysum fruticans include reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of helichrysum fruticans include essential oils, capsules, and teas that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
